seoTitle: York County School Division Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: York County School Division 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 24 first day, Jun 9 last day, holidays, winter break, spring break, early release dates, PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: York County School Division starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 24, 2026. Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Spring Break runs April 5-9, and the last day of school is June 9, 2027. The official PDF also lists student holidays, schools and offices closed dates, early releases, quarter starts, interim reports, report cards, school hours, and make-up day notes.

customSections.label: 2026-2027 YCSD Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: Use this quick reference for the most-searched York County School Division Calendar 2026-2027 dates before reviewing the full YCSD date list.

customSections.label: YCSD Calendar Planning Guide
customSections.content: Families can use the York County School Division 2026-2027 calendar as a planning tool for vacations, childcare, transportation, appointments, and school activities. The official calendar notes that all early release days and student holidays are potential make-up days, so families should be careful before treating those dates as permanent no-school plans. The calendar also includes academic checkpoints such as quarter starts, interim reports, report cards, and early release dates that may matter for student planning even when they are not traditional school holidays.

groups.label: Family Vacation Planning
items: Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027.

groups.label: Childcare and Transportation
items: Early release days can require different pickup or transportation plans than regular school days.
Student holidays and early release days are listed as potential make-up days in the official YCSD calendar.
Families should confirm school-level dismissal times and school hours with their assigned school.

groups.label: Academic Planning
items: Quarter starts, interim reports, and report card dates help families track academic checkpoints.
Elementary, middle, and high school report card timing may differ near the end of the year.
Weather-related schedule changes and make-up day decisions should be verified with York County School Division.

customSections.label: YCSD Calendar Changes: 2025-2026 vs 2026-2027
customSections.content: Compare the current York County School Division calendar with the previous school year. The 2026-2027 YCSD calendar starts one day earlier than the 2025-2026 school year, ends one day earlier, and keeps Winter Break and Spring Break on similar seasonal schedules.

rows: Not separately calculated on this page

customSections.label: YCSD Calendar Source and Verification Notes
customSections.content: This York County School Division calendar page was last checked against the official YCSD calendar source on July 20, 2026. MySchoolDates is an independent planning reference, not an official York County School Division website, and YCSD remains the source of record for calendar revisions, school-specific schedules, emergency changes, and make-up day decisions.

groups.label: What Families Should Verify
items: Check the official York County School Division calendar page before making travel, childcare, or transportation commitments.
The .ics calendar file is a one-time import generated from checked records and will not automatically update if YCSD revises the calendar.
School hours, early release dismissal times, athletics, testing, graduation, and school-specific events may require confirmation with the assigned school.

calendarFaqs.q: When does York County School Division start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break for YCSD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is York County School Division Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for York County School Division in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, June 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Are YCSD early release days potential make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The official 2026-2027 calendar notes that all early release days and student holidays are potential make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in the York County School Division 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: This page calculates 180 currently scheduled instructional days from the published YCSD calendar records. Families should confirm any revisions with York County School Division.

calendarFaqs.q: Does YCSD have early release days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The YCSD calendar lists early release days on January 22, April 2, April 30, and June 9, 2027. Families should confirm school-level dismissal times.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the YCSD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official PDF link on this page to open the York County School Division student calendar PDF. MySchoolDates also provides an .ics calendar file for calendar apps.

calendarFaqs.q: Is MySchoolDates the official York County School Division website?
calendarFaqs.a: No. MySchoolDates is an independent calendar reference and is not affiliated with York County School Division. Families should verify schedule changes, emergency updates, and school-specific events with YCSD.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the YCSD calendar include report card and interim dates?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 YCSD calendar includes quarter starts, interim reports, elementary report cards, and middle and high school report card dates.

calendarFaqs.q: Can YCSD weather closures change the school calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Weather closures, emergency schedule changes, and make-up day decisions can change the practical schedule. Families should verify final updates with York County School Division.
